name: Grandma's Pickled Beets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, bring the vinegar to boil and add the sugar slowly until dissolved. Stir constantly.
2. Open the cans of beets and retain the juice from one can. Add the beets (whole) to the boiling vinegar/sugar solution and bring back to a boil.
3. Add the retained beet juice (about 1/4 cup worth).
4. Add salt and pepper. Boil for about 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
5. Sterilize two jars with capacity of about 10-12 oz.
6. Put beets into sterilized jars, cover with vinegar/sugar solution, and seal with lids.
7. Let stand several days before serving. This is a sweet pickle best served cold. Excellent with beef and pork.
